offer: Automation tool that generates monthly maintenance compliance reports for property management supervisors.
problem: Property management supervisors need efficient compliance reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property management advice
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about compliance tools
DM outreach to property managers with a demo video
Join forums where property management tools are discussed
try_it: Let users try manual invoice entry for 1-3 items
pay: Subscription model with tiered pricing options
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Create templates for common report formats
Set default reminders for report submissions
Allow CSV imports for existing compliance data
Streamline the onboarding process for new users
